title: Smoke Aurora
description:
Smoke Aurora is a Create modpack, but it also includes other mods such as modern weapons and farming mods. It is a very relaxed and diverse modpack.  

If you have futher questions or you looking for a new place to play come to https://discord.gg/FmpzqvC
body:
**This is a beta**

## Smoke Aurora

The versatile Create experience, redefined.

Born from the wishes of our community: a pack that combines the technical elegance of Create 6 with the excitement of new weapons and thrilling gameplay mods. Over 50 mods were removed and replaced with hand-picked, fresh ideas.

What to expect:

New harmony: A perfectly balanced mix of engineering, combat, and exploration.

Smooth performance: Optimized for smooth gameplay, even in large multiplayer sessions.

A breath of fresh air: Forget what you think you know. Discover new strategies and possibilities.

We are in open beta! That means: play, have fun, give feedback. Help us make Smoke Aurora the next big thing.

Updates will come as usual, of course. Be part of it!
